title: corydalis sibirica var. ochotensis
intro: Corydalis sibirica var. ochotensis, a perennial plant of the poppy family Papaveraceae, is also known as the Ochotense Corydalis or Sibirian Corydalis. This plant is traditionally used in medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been attributed to the presence of berberine and other alkaloids. The health benefits associated with Corydalis sibirica var. ochotensis include pain relief, improved digestion, and reduced inflammation, making it a popular herb in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and it can also be found in various herbal combinations, such as teas, capsules, and ointments.
